exploration_notes:
**Methodology**: Searched all three repos (kubernetes, grafana, etcd) via Sourcegraph keyword/NLS search and local grep for `status.Errorf(codes.`, `status.Error(codes.`, `togRPCError`, `HTTPStatusFromCode`, and gRPC-to-HTTP translation patterns.

**Kubernetes/kubernetes**: gRPC status errors are created at the CRI streaming layer (`staging/src/k8s.io/kubelet/pkg/cri/streaming/server.go` with `codes.InvalidArgument`) and in CSI volume operations. The `cri-api/pkg/errors/errors.go` file provides
